metadata.title: Dervis Gómez | Full Stack Developer — Web, Mobile & Azure
metadata.description: Full Stack Developer with 9+ years of experience building production web apps, mobile apps and APIs with Angular, React, Next.js, ASP.NET Core, Firebase and Azure.
metadata.keywords: Dervis Gómez, Full Stack Developer, web developer, mobile applications, Angular, React, Next.js, ASP.NET Core, Firebase, TypeScript, Azure, REST API, PWA, developer portfolio, Latin America

I contributed to the development and evolution of the mobile applications, integrating features, backend services and app store publishing processes.

ubicaturepuesto.name: UbicaTuRepuesto.cl
ubicaturepuesto.subtitle: Marketplace specialized in automotive spare parts.
ubicaturepuesto.description: Marketplace specialized in searching and quoting automotive spare parts. The platform connects users with suppliers, allowing quote requests, offer comparison and order management from web and mobile devices.
ubicaturepuesto.longDescription: UbicaTuRepuesto.cl is an automotive commerce platform focused on spare part search and quotation workflows. It enables quote requests to multiple suppliers, offer comparison and centralized order management across web and mobile. Project delivered through APPI.CL for the Chilean automotive market.

impact.description: Production platform connecting buyers and spare part suppliers with quote workflows, offer comparison and order management.

responsibilities.1: Integrated PHP webservices for business logic and supplier communication.
responsibilities.2: Implemented automated emails for notifications and follow-up.
responsibilities.3: Built offer and price comparison features.
responsibilities.4: Developed order management, tracking and purchase status flows.
responsibilities.5: Implemented product catalog, categories and spare parts search.
responsibilities.6: Contributed to the admin panel, user management and marketplace evolution.

churchapi.name: Church API
churchapi.subtitle: Production-ready REST API built with ASP.NET Core 8, Entity Framework Core, Azure SQL, Docker and Azure Container Apps.
churchapi.description: Production-ready REST API built with ASP.NET Core 8, Entity Framework Core, Azure SQL, Docker and Azure Container Apps.
churchapi.longDescription: Church API is a REST API built with ASP.NET Core 8 following a layered architecture. It implements JWT authentication, Entity Framework Core, SQL Server, Docker, Health Checks, Serilog, automated tests and deployment on Azure Container Apps using Azure SQL Database.

impact.description: Scalable backend deployed on Azure Container Apps with cloud SQL Server, live Swagger documentation and service health monitoring.

jwtAuth.title: JWT Authentication
jwtAuth.description: Token-based security to protect endpoints and control access to API resources.

fullCrud.title: Full CRUD
fullCrud.description: Create, Read, Update and Delete operations for the main domain entities.

layeredArchitecture.title: Layered Architecture
layeredArchitecture.description: Clear separation between controllers, services and data access for maintainability and testing.

efMigrations.title: Entity Framework Core Migrations
efMigrations.description: Controlled database schema evolution through versioned migrations.

healthChecks.title: Health Checks
healthChecks.description: Health endpoint to verify service availability and dependencies in production.

serilogLogging.title: Structured logging with Serilog
serilogLogging.description: Structured event and error logging for observability and cloud diagnostics.

envVariables.title: Environment variables
envVariables.description: Externalized configuration for different environments without changing application code.

dockerMultiStage.title: Docker multi-stage
dockerMultiStage.description: Optimized production image with multi-stage build and reproducible deployment.

azureContainerApps.title: Azure Container Apps
azureContainerApps.description: Serverless container deployment with automatic scaling on Azure.

azureSql.title: Azure SQL
azureSql.description: Managed relational database on Azure SQL Database for production persistence.

automatedTests.title: Automated tests
automatedTests.description: Suite of 46 automated tests with xUnit to validate business logic and endpoints.

responsibilities.0: Designed the layered API architecture with ASP.NET Core 8.
responsibilities.1: Implemented JWT authentication and endpoint authorization.
responsibilities.2: Developed CRUD operations with Entity Framework Core.
responsibilities.3: Configured migrations and persistence with SQL Server / Azure SQL.
responsibilities.4: Integrated Health Checks and structured logging with Serilog.
responsibilities.5: Containerized the application with Docker multi-stage.
responsibilities.6: Deployed to Azure Container Apps and Azure Container Registry.
responsibilities.8: Implemented environment variables for per-environment configuration.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Professional <highlight>journey</highlight>
experience.description: Nearly a decade building digital products for companies across Latin America — from mobile apps to enterprise platforms.

appi.description: I participated as a Full Stack Developer in the development of web, mobile, and PWA applications for organizations across Latin America. I implemented frontend and backend solutions using Angular, Ionic, Firebase, Node.js, and ASP.NET Core. I collaborated on marketplace projects, enterprise recognition platforms, process automation, corporate systems, and applications published on Google Play and the App Store.

wonderchatt.description: Developed REST APIs and real-time communication features using Node.js, Express, and Socket.IO, contributing to backend architecture and mobile integration.

sistemex.description: Contributed to the development and maintenance of enterprise applications focused on internal process management. Worked on frontend and backend feature implementation, database integration and support for corporate systems.

pixelgrafia.description: Developed a native Android application with Java and Android Studio, contributing to the design, implementation and delivery of the app for the client.

uniserv.description: Developed native Android applications with Java and Android Studio for Agua Kpital Cúcuta, implementing mobile features and supporting apps in production.
